findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The North Carolina state seal image/logo is missing from the HTML version
findings.evidence: PDF has the North Carolina state seal centered at the top of the page. HTML has no image present.

findings.description: Underlined text rendered differently in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Please attach this letter to the cover of your existing mining permit for future reference.' with underline. HTML preserves the underline styling but breaks it across lines differently.

findings.description: The HTML has no h1 element serving as a document title, and no heading hierarchy at all. The document structure lacks any headings to organize the content.
findings.evidence: The HTML contains no h1, h2, or any heading tags. The entire document is rendered as paragraphs within nested <main> elements.

findings.description: The HTML contains nested <main> elements, which is invalid HTML structure. The outer <main> wraps the entire body content, and an inner <main> contains the letter body.
findings.evidence: HTML has <main> inside <main>, with <header> and <footer> siblings to the inner <main>.

findings.description: The PDF contains two images (the NC state seal and the DEQ logo at the bottom), but neither has an tag in the HTML. The images are omitted entirely rather than having alt text.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the North Carolina state seal at the top and the DEQ logo near the footer. The HTML contains no tags at all.
